Resembles funds your followed group has historically done well in.
Fits your ticket size and liquidity headroom.

featured.name: Moonfare Technology Fund
featured.desc: Diversify your investment in transformational AI technologies via multiple elite managers, all in a single Moonfare investment.

new.objective: Onboard & place the first portfolio product
goals: Agree the target allocation & first commitment

actionsDetail.signal: Recent liquidity event · large investable cash
actionsDetail.observation: Investable wealth likely understated vs a profile like this
actionsDetail.why: Confirming the true figure right-sizes the whole plan.

actionsDetail.observation: Behind the private-markets target with clear room to deploy
actionsDetail.why: A first commitment gets the J-curve started now, not next year.
Keeps the relationship warm and the pipeline in front of them.

existing.objective: Deepen the relationship & secure the next commitment
goals: Review since last talk & confirm the profile
Close the gap to target with the next commitment

actionsDetail.observation: Profile & wealth may have shifted since the last review

actionsDetail.why: The next commitment closes the single largest gap.
Follower feed is the best between-call touchpoint.

inactive.objective: Reactivate with a timely, concrete opportunity
goals: Re-engage on a missed / live deal
Reserve interest on the open opportunity

actionsDetail.why: Catch with the live deal before anything structural.
Lock the spot while it's open.

actionsDetail.observation: No structured review on file this year
actionsDetail.why: Book the portfolio review to convert re-engagement into a plan.

pregate.objective: Tease the tailored model & route to accreditation
goals: Show the tailored model & peer position

actionsDetail.why: Enough to show a tailored model without an account.

actionsDetail.observation: Model & peer position computed from age/risk/wealth
actionsDetail.why: Seeing the tailored model builds conviction to accredit.
Route to KYC while interest is high.

execSummary.title: Executive summary — what to achieve
execSummary.script: This briefing is for you, not the client. Lead with the strongest case the data makes — keep it to three moves.

intake.title: Client profile — prefilled & editable

cfa.t: Capture region & profession for peer matching

intake.script: Before we look at any numbers, let me confirm a few things so the model is right for you. Are you still comfortable treating roughly this amount as investable?

intakeMin.title: Minimum intake — three quick questions
intakeMin.script: Just a couple of quick questions and I can show you what a tailored portfolio could look like — no account needed yet.

setTarget.title: Set the target allocation
setTarget.script: Based on your profile, here is the private-markets target we'd suggest. Does that proportion feel right to you?

confirmTarget.title: Confirm the target — still right?
confirmTarget.script: We haven't spoken in a while — let me make sure nothing's changed. Is this still your investable wealth and risk appetite?

aiThinking.title: Building your tailored model…
aiThinking.script: Give me one moment — I'm tailoring a model portfolio to exactly your profile.

modelPortfolio.title: Your tailored model portfolio
modelPortfolio.script: This is the portfolio we'd build for someone with your profile. Notice it's diversified across the strategies that fit you.

modelExisting.title: Model vs your portfolio today
modelExisting.script: Here's where you are today against the model we'd recommend — the gaps are exactly what we can act on.

overview.title: Your portfolio — as it stands
overview.script: Here's your portfolio as it stands today — performance, allocation and cash-flow.

changesSince.title: Since our last conversation
changesSince.script: A lot has happened since we last spoke — let me walk you through the highlights.

peerComparison.title: You vs your peers
peerComparison.script: People with a profile like yours typically allocate quite differently — let me show you.

multiComparison.title: Compare — peers, platform, model, endowments
multiComparison.script: Let's see how you stack up — against peers, our platform, the model, and even the endowments.

compareToCurrent.title: Suggested vs your current portfolio
compareToCurrent.script: Here's the suggested portfolio against what you hold today — the deltas are the conversation.

future.title: Your future — commitments & J-curve
future.script: If we commit at this pace, here's how your portfolio builds and pays out over time.

nextBest.title: Next best action — recommended sequence
nextBest.script: Here's the sequence I'd suggest. Let's start with the building block that matters most for you.

nextBestHints.title: A few ideas to get started
nextBestHints.script: Once your account's set up, this is roughly the sequence we'd walk through together.

simTarget.title: Simulate your target portfolio
simTarget.script: Want to adjust anything? We can nudge the mix and you'll see your portfolio update instantly.

simExisting.title: Simulate — target + your holdings
simExisting.script: Let's model adding to your book and see what it does to your overall shape.

simFull.title: Simulator — full toggles
simFull.script: All dimensions are open here — strategy, region, currency, sector, vintage.

targetSimulator.title: Target simulator
targetSimulator.script: Let's fine-tune the target itself, then compare it against where you are.

managerComparison.title: Manager comparison
managerComparison.script: For someone at your level — here's how the managers compare on IRR, consistency and delivery.

fundComparison.title: Fund comparison
fundComparison.script: And here are the specific funds head-to-head — the detail you'd expect.

opportunities.title: Opportunities to act on now
opportunities.script: Look at this — this is exactly the kind of opportunity worth coming back for.

missedOut.title: What you missed — and what's next
missedOut.script: You've been away a while and missed a couple of strong ones — but here's what's live right now.

seize.title: Seize this opportunity
seize.script: Shall I reserve your interest? You'll get a note the moment it opens — no commitment yet.

follower.title: Follow what matters
follower.script: Want to know what your peers and the top performers are doing? I can keep you posted.

backToKyc.title: Continue on Moonfare
backToKyc.script: To actually invest, the next step is a quick accreditation on Moonfare — shall I send you straight there?

advisorBook.name: Dr. A. Reuter

lead.reason: Recent exit — large investable cash; mentioned wanting heavy AI/Tech exposure.

notes: Sold his SaaS company Q1 2026 — liquidity event ~€40m.
Said in onboarding chat: 'I want to be heavy in AI, light on European exposure.'
advisorBook.prep: Brand-new, sophisticated. Onboard cleanly, agree a target, place a first portfolio product, lock the follow-up.

advisorBook.name: M. Coburger

lead.reason: Only 15.7% in private markets vs 35% target — well behind peers.

notes: Wants to keep it simple — no jargon.
Cautious risk class; revisit whether still right.
advisorBook.prep: Behind peers and target. Use the gap + peers to justify the next commitment; secure follower opt-in.

advisorBook.name: H. Meier

lead.reason: Lexington Secondary he watch-listed just opened — and he missed Databricks & Anthropic.

notes: Watch-listed Lexington Capital Partners — now open.
Reactivate with the deal, not a profile loop.
advisorBook.prep: Catch with the live deal first (Lexington), reference what he missed, then book a structured review.

advisorBook.name: S. Weber

lead.reason: First-time private-markets investor — ready for a starter portfolio product.

notes: New to private markets — keep it very simple.
Euro only, portfolio products, no individual funds.
advisorBook.prep: Keep it basic. Show the model, the J-curve, and place a single portfolio product.

advisorBook.name: E. Lindqvist

lead.reason: Pro investor — asking for manager/fund-level detail and secondaries exposure.

notes: Full professional — 'don't come to me with a strategy bucket, I want vintage detail.'
advisorBook.prep: Go deep: manager & fund comparison, secondaries, full simulator. This is the L3 showcase.

events.title: KKR exits Axel Springer at ~2.4×
events.body: KKR has completed the sale of its remaining stake in Axel Springer, crystallising a ~2.4× gross return. LPs in KKR North America XIII should expect a distribution in the coming weeks.

events.title: Anthropic files to go public
events.body: Anthropic — held across several growth & AI vehicles on the platform — has confidentially filed for an IPO, a potential liquidity event for AI-sleeve holders.

events.title: Ares closes its latest private-credit fund above target
events.body: Ares held a final close on its newest private-credit vehicle above its target size — a signal of continued institutional demand for the strategy.

events.title: EQT to acquire a European healthcare platform
events.body: EQT agreed to take a majority position in a healthcare-services group, deepening its buyout healthcare exposure.

events.title: Databricks weighs a 2026 public listing
events.body: A widely-held late-stage growth name is reportedly preparing to list — closely watched by growth & venture LPs.
